# Steinmetz Decoded

> A source-grounded public research archive for Charles Proteus Steinmetz: primary texts, OCR/PDF readers, equations, diagrams, concept dossiers, glossary entries, comparisons, and carefully labeled interpretive layers.

Canonical site: https://steinmetz-decoded.vercel.app/
Repository: https://github.com/TRUEMODELOFTHEWORLD/Steinmetz-Decoded
Topic map: https://steinmetz-decoded.vercel.app/steinmetz-research-topics/
Sitemap: https://steinmetz-decoded.vercel.app/sitemap-index.xml
License: public/open research archive; see repository license and citation files.

## Best Starting Points

- Start Reading: https://steinmetz-decoded.vercel.app/start-reading/
- Steinmetz Research Topic Map: https://steinmetz-decoded.vercel.app/steinmetz-research-topics/
- Who Was Steinmetz: https://steinmetz-decoded.vercel.app/who-was-steinmetz/
- Book Coverage: https://steinmetz-decoded.vercel.app/book-coverage/
- Concept Encyclopedia: https://steinmetz-decoded.vercel.app/concepts/
- Source Text Browser: https://steinmetz-decoded.vercel.app/source-texts/
- Equation Atlas: https://steinmetz-decoded.vercel.app/mathematics/equation-atlas/
- Visual Topic Galleries: https://steinmetz-decoded.vercel.app/diagrams/visual-topic-galleries/
- Glossary: https://steinmetz-decoded.vercel.app/glossary/
- Research Operations: https://steinmetz-decoded.vercel.app/research-operations/

## Core Topics Covered

Charles Proteus Steinmetz, C. P. Steinmetz, alternating current, AC power engineering, symbolic method, complex quantities, phasors, impedance, reactance, admittance, conductance, susceptance, hysteresis, Steinmetz hysteresis law, magnetic loss, transients, oscillations, surges, lightning, electric waves, radiation, illumination, dielectricity, electrostatic capacity, distributed constants, ether and field language, Tesla-era electrical science, historical electrical terminology, electrical engineering history, and public-domain engineering texts.

## Source Discipline

The archive separates:

- Steinmetz source text and OCR/PDF candidates
- modern engineering interpretation
- mathematical reconstruction
- historical notes
- Tesla-era comparison
- ether-field interpretive reading
- speculative or needs-verification material

Exact quotations, equations, page labels, captions, and diagrams should be checked against source scans before citation.

## Machine-Readable Data

- Public data manifest: https://steinmetz-decoded.vercel.app/data/manifest.json
- Source text data: https://steinmetz-decoded.vercel.app/source-texts-data/
- The corpus and processing outputs are linked from the repository and public data pages.
